title: Unused function check_noverific_env in frontends/verific/verific.cc
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Build yosys ( 5f1fea08d5e14ecaa1cf60eb865c60132a0ce3e1) with `gcc (Debian 7.3.0-5) 7.3.0`.

## Expected behavior

Yosys builds without warnings.

## Actual behavior

The build emits a single warning;
```
frontends/verific/verific.cc:1679:6: warning: ‘bool {anonymous}::check_noverific_env()’ defined but not used [-Wunused-function]
 bool check_noverific_env()
      ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
```
code_blocks:
frontends/verific/verific.cc:1679:6: warning: ‘bool {anonymous}::check_noverific_env()’ defined but not used [-Wunused-function]
 bool check_noverific_env()
      ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
